title: Plan-document location resolver
description:
A boundary resolver that loads a plan document from either the issue body or a configured external path and feeds its content to the pure validation engine.

## Success Criteria

- [ ] An inline plan body and an external-file plan both resolve to the same projected content for validation.
- [ ] File reading happens at the boundary; the validation engine performs no filesystem I/O.
- [ ] A missing or unreadable external plan path produces a clear error.
